zh.Tourcoing: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德圖爾可
zh.Gent: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele於1165年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent27歲，母親Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde15歲。他於1200年與Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1226年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德圖爾可享年61歲。

zh-hans.Tourcoing: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德圖爾可
zh-hans.Gent: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele于1165年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent27岁，母亲Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde15岁。他于1200年与Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1226年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德圖爾可享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Jent
meanings: English: variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Ghent
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gentes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Lucien, Marcel, Normand.
French (Gentès): probably a nickname derived from Old French gent ‘high born, noble’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Gent  .

variants.name: Genther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Otto.
German:
variant of   Gent  .

variants.name: Genthe
meanings: German: variant of Gente (see Gent ), or a habitational name from Gentha in Saxony-Anhalt, east of Wittenberg.

nameMeanings.name: Zeger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Luitger .

nameMeanings.name: Steppo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form, via the intermediate forms Stonebrooch and Stonebrech, of an unidentified German surname, possibly Steinbruch or Steinbruck (see Steinbrook ).

variants.name: Steinbrook
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Steinbrüchel or perhaps German Steinbruch: occupational name for a stone worker, from Middle High German stein ‘stone’ + break ‘break, fracture’ + -el agent suffix. Compare Stainbrook .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German Steinbruck or Steinbrück: habitational name from any of the places called Steinbruck, Steinbrück, Steinenbruck, Steinenbrück.
History: The progenitor of at least some of the Steinbrooks appears to be Jacob Steinbrüchel or Steinbruch, a German from Switzerland who arrived in PA in the middle of the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele was born in 1165, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent, was 27 and his mother, Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, was 15. He married Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain in 1200. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1226, in Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele est né en 1165, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain en 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1226, à Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele 1165 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent 27 und seine Mutter Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde 15. Er hat 1200 Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1226 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele è nato il nel 1165 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain nel 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1226, nel Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Tourcoing: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードトウルコイング
ja.Gent: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェント
ja.lifeSummary: Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezeleが1165年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gentは27歳，母Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermondeは15歳であった。1200年にBeatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1226年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードトウルコイングで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele(이)가 1165년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1200년 Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1226년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 토우르코잉에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele nasceu em 1165, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain em 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1226, em Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele родился в 1165 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain в 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1226 г. в местности тоуркоинг, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

sm.1200-1227: mai le 1200 e o'o I le 1227

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Zeger Steppo van Gent van Viggezele nació en 1165, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Zeger Steppo, kruisvaarder van Gent, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Peterke Rogier Zeger van Gent Kortrijk Dendermonde, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Beatrijs Hugo Anselm de Hosdain en 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1226, en Tourcoing, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
